title: Computer & Laptop Sales & Service
desc: New and refurbished systems, repairs, upgrades, and on-site troubleshooting for offices and home users across Jammu.

title: Networking, Wi-Fi & LAN Setup
desc: Structured cabling, router configuration, office Wi-Fi, and secure LAN design for reliable connectivity.

title: CCTV & Security Systems
desc: IP and analog camera installation, DVR/NVR setup, remote viewing, and maintenance for shops, offices, and homes.

title: Software & Website Development
desc: Business websites, billing software, inventory systems, and custom apps built around how your team actually works.

title: Cloud, Server & Data Backup
desc: Server setup, cloud migration, automated backups, and disaster recovery so your data survives hardware failure.

title: Annual Maintenance (AMC)
desc: Scheduled visits, priority support, and preventive care for your computers, network, and printers — one fixed yearly plan.

title: IT Consulting & Support
desc: Honest advice on what to buy, what to fix, and what to replace — plus remote and on-site support when things break.
